arabic_text:
نفس = نف + س
نفث = نف + ث
نفح = نف + ح
نفخ = نف + خ
english_text: To Breadth (blow normally) / To blow very lightly / Breeze / To blow forcefully
alt_text: Four stacked cards showing Arabic root nf- conjugations with English glosses (same diagram reused from ch176 img 001).
notes: Duplicate content of binder 35 ch176 img 001.
